creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
This version is a maintenance release and contains bug fixes only. Previos version (12.4.4)
contained security fix though.

For details about the release, please see:

https://get.typo3.org/release-notes/12.4.5

or our news https://typo3.org/article/typo3-1245-maintenance-release-published
